title: Cron/deploy jobs for the ci user fail: account has no login shell
description_md:
Automation that runs commands as the `ci` service account (`su - ci -c '...'`) started failing with `This account is currently not available`. The account was 'hardened' recently. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), find why `ci` can't run a login shell, and restore its ability to run jobs.

You're done when `su - ci -c 'echo ok'` runs successfully.
